titleStmt.title: SII 36.192: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 192. (A.R. No. 192 of 1910.) PĀRIYŪR (Pāriyūrgrāmam), GOBICHETTIPALAYAM TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On the base round the Nandi maṇḍapa in the courtyard of the Amaraphaṇīśvara temple.

summary.p: (Kali 4966, Raktāṭchi, Paṅguni, 25, Wednesday, Pūsam = A.D. 1865, April 5, Wednesday.).
Records that the Nandi maṇḍapa was constructed in the temple of Amarapaṇīśvarasvāmi at Pāriyūr in Kāñchikūval-nāḍu by Kāḻiyaṇa Gouṇḍaṉ of Kaṇvāḻ gōthram, a veḷḷāḷa of Nañjēgavuṇḍaṉ-pāḷaiyam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kaliyuka cakāptam 4 1000 9 100 6 10 6 yitiṉ mel cellāniṉṟa ṟaktāṭci varuṣam paṅkuṉi mātam 2 10 5 teti puta vāṟamum tacamiyum pūca naṭcatramum tratināma yokamum tai tulākaṟaṇamum peṟṟa cupatiṉattil kāñcikūval nāṭṭil pāriyūriliru
kkum Amaṟapaṇicuvaṟa cuvāmikki nañ cekavuṇṭaṉ pāḻaiyat(t)tilē yirukkum veḷāḷarkaḻil
kaṇvāḻ kotratil nañ cekavuṇṭaṉ makaṉ cuppa kavuṇṭaṉ makaṉ kantappa kavuṇṭaṉ kuḷanta kavuṇṭaṉ kāḻiyaṇa kavuṇṭaṉ ṉantikuṟaṭu ceyitu vaitta vupayam
Digital edition of SII 36.192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
